zh.lifeSummary: 當Blanche de Brienne於1246年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延庫普特萊時，她的父親Jean de Brienne24歲，母親Jeanne de Chateaudun19歲。她於1267年2月之前與Guillaume de Fiennes II結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1302年6月11日在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特盧普藍德享年56歲，埋葬在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延庫普特萊。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Blanche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname for a blonde, from blanche, feminine of Old French blanc ‘white’ (of Germanic origin). It came to be associated with the notion of whiteness as indicating purity, and was introduced into England as a given name by the Normans. A pale complexion combined with light hair was long an ideal of beauty in Europe (compare Modern English fair, which at first meant ‘beautiful’ and then, from the 16th century, ‘light in colouring’).

en.lifeSummary: When Blanche de Brienne was born in 1246, in Couptrain, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, her father, Jean de Brienne, was 24 and her mother, Jeanne de Chateaudun, was 19. She married Guillaume de Fiennes II before February 1267. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 11 June 1302, in Louplande, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 56, and was buried in Couptrain, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Blanche de Brienne est née en 1246, à Couptrain, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Jean de Brienne, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Chateaudun, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume de Fiennes II avant février 1267. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 juin 1302, à Louplande, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Couptrain, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Blanche de Brienne 1246 in Couptrain, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean de Brienne 24 und ihre Mutter Jeanne de Chateaudun 19. Sie hat vor Februar 1267 Guillaume de Fiennes II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. Juni 1302 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Louplande, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Couptrain, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Blanche de Brienne è nata il nel 1246 nel Couptrain, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, sua padre, Jean de Brienne, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Jeanne de Chateaudun, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Guillaume de Fiennes II prima del febbraio 1267. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 11 giugno 1302, nel Louplande, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Couptrain, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia.

ko.Couptrain, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Fr: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 코우프트레이

ko.lifeSummary: Blanche de Brienne(이)가 1246년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 코우프트레이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean de Brienne(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne de Chateaudun(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1267년 2월 이전 Guillaume de Fiennes II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1302년 6월 11일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 루플랜드에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 코우프트레이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Blanche de Brienne nasceu em 1246, em Couptrain, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Jean de Brienne, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Chateaudun, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume de Fiennes II antes fevereiro de 1267. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de junho de 1302, em Louplande, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, França, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Couptrain, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Blanche de Brienne родилась в 1246 г. в местности коуптреин, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Jean de Brienne было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Chateaudun, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume de Fiennes II перед февраль 1267 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 11 июня 1302 г. в местности лоупланд, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности коуптреин, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Blanche de Brienne nació en 1246, en Couptrain, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, su papá, Jean de Brienne, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Chateaudun, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Guillaume de Fiennes II antes de febrero de 1267. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 11 de junio de 1302, en Louplande, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Couptrain, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia.
